title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Delaware North India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Delaware North India
jsonLd.description:
Delaware North India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Noida. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Delaware North India:
Delaware North India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India!
